_meta.description: AG+MM ws=8 TT transpose on MI300X — heuristic defaults (no per-shape benchmarks yet)
_meta.source: heuristic extrapolation from NN transpose champion data
_meta.convention: Shapes are (M, N, K) for col-parallel (M-sharded) AG+MM, both A and B transposed

heuristic_rules.note: Uses same heuristic as NN transpose. Shape-specific tuning pending.
